title: fix(deps): update module github.com/crc-org/vfkit to v0.6.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/crc-org/vfkit](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit) | `v0.5.1` -> `v0.6.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.5.1/v0.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.5.1/v0.6.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/vfkit (github.com/crc-org/vfkit)</summary>

### [`v0.6.0`](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.6.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.5.1...v0.6.0)

Finally a new vfkit release with many interesting new features, initial macOS guest support, NBD support, ignition/cloud-init support and a lot more, as well as many cleanups and bug fixes. Thanks to everyone who contributed to this release!

#### What's Changed

##### New features

-   Add support for nvme devices by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/78](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/78)
-   feat: add support for NBD by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/212](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/212)
-   Add support for running macOS guests. by [@​williamtheaker](https://redirect.github.com/williamtheaker) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/148](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/148)
-   ignition: add support for ignition config file by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/209](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/209)
-   cloudinit: leverage virtio-blk to push cloud-init configuration by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/207](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/207)
-   Add readonly option for storage devices by [@​nirs](https://redirect.github.com/nirs) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/179](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/179)
-   rosetta: add option to ignore rosetta failure when installation cancelled by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/202](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/202)
-   Report list of devices in the REST API by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/99](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/99)

##### Bug fixes/code cleanups/...

-   Many dependencies updates, see full commit log for details
-   timesync: Fix automatic vsock device creation by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/191](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/191)
-   virtionet: Fix 'path too long' issues with virtio-net unixgram Support by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/195](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/195)
-   tests: Add basic e2e test by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/61](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/61)
-   refactor: improve code for wait vm to reach the specified state by [@​BlackHole1](https://redirect.github.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/75](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/75)
-   refactor(vsock): call proxy.Close when vm stop by [@​BlackHole1](https://redirect.github.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/74](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/74)
-   feat(config): add AddDevices function by [@​BlackHole1](https://redirect.github.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/89](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/89)
-   refactor: improve function comments by [@​BlackHole1](https://redirect.github.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/90](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/90)
-   Make e2e tests more robust by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/100](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/100)
-   Generate vfkit version from git tag by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/69](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/69)
-   json: test: Add 'stability' JSON test by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/103](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/103)
-   Add vf.VirtualMachine and vf.VirtualMachineConfiguration types by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/112](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/112)
-   Minor doc improvements. by [@​williamtheaker](https://redirect.github.com/williamtheaker) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/141](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/141)
-   Move linting to separate job. by [@​williamtheaker](https://redirect.github.com/williamtheaker) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/156](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/156)
-   gh: Stop using macos11 runners by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/164](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/164)
-   Fix linting issues by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/185](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/185)
-   doc: Fix recently reported issues by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/181](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/181)
-   virtionet: testing connectUnixPath by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/199](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/199)
-   doc: Set minimum supported version to macOS 12 by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/197](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/197)
-   contrib: update start-crc-bundle to use UEFI boot by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/201](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/201)
-   Add Luca to OWNERS by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/226](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/226)
-   doc: Document the 'state' value in `GET /vm/status` by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/224](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/224)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​williamtheaker](https://redirect.github.com/williamtheaker) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/141](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/141)
-   [@​nirs](https://redirect.github.com/nirs) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/179](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/179)
-   [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/199](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/199)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.5.1...v0.6.0

</details>

This line also needs to be updated to 0.6.0:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/b3c02684fdb403cd4709eadc10e0099e92c95605/contrib/pkginstaller/Makefile#L10

> This line also needs to be updated to 0.6.0:

Oh, we should do this in a new PR now. I guess it would be good to teach renovate to update this version as well so we do not have to remember it.
